mechanism_narrative: Sustained positive momentum in non-farm payrolls indicates a healthy labor market, which supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods where PAYEMS shows consistent month-over-month growth.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate persistently above 8.0% signals severe labor market distress, leading to reduced consumer confidence and spending, which negatively impacts corporate profits and S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite high unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation turns negative (deflation) while the federal funds rate is at the zero lower bound, it signals a severe economic contraction where monetary policy is constrained, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of periods where both deflation and zero lower bound conditions are met.

mechanism_narrative: During a post-recession recovery, strong and accelerating retail sales indicate robust consumer demand, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances during a recovery regime.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rebound in housing starts above a critical threshold signals a recovery in the housing market and broader economic confidence, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as construction activity increases.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite housing recovery signals.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp and sustained decline in industrial production indicates a significant contraction in manufacturing and mining output, signaling weakening corporate earnings and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of periods where industrial production is contracting severely.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is held near the zero lower bound, it indicates an extremely accommodative monetary policy aimed at stimulating the economy, which typically supports asset prices and leads to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of periods where FEDFUNDS is near zero.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of negative GDP growth and a rapidly rising unemployment rate unequivocally signals a deepening recession, which severely impacts corporate profitability and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter annualized growth < 0% AND UNRATE 3-month change > 0.5pp
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite clear recessionary signals.
